subject: docs(claude): replace stale glow-props AI Note with implementation patterns section
body:
The "Shared conventions with glow-props" AI Note referenced "suggested
implementations" that no longer exist at that location. Replaced with
the canonical "Implementation patterns — always fetch from glow-props"
note, added the standard "Implementation Patterns (Source of Truth)"
section, and added a prohibition against creating local pattern copies.

Tags: docs, claude-md, glow-props, conventions
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: claude-md-alignment
Semver: patch
